mapper.insert: insert into knowledge_chunk (knowledge_id, chunk_index, content, context_prefix, vector_status, retry_count, create_time) values (#{knowledgeId}, #{chunkIndex}, #{content}, #{contextPrefix}, #{vectorStatus}, #{retryCount}, now())
mapper.update: update knowledge_chunk set vector_status = #{vectorStatus}, error_msg = #{errorMsg}, retry_count = #{retryCount}, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select * from knowledge_chunk where knowledge_id = #{knowledgeId} order by chunk_index
select * from knowledge_chunk where vector_status = 0 limit #{offset}, #{limit}
select count(*) from knowledge_chunk where vector_status = 0
mapper.update:
update knowledge_chunk set vector_status = #{status} where id in
#{id}
